elements.name: Create Multi Line Customer Sales Order for "123305", "123306" for branch "1BL"

steps.name: the API end point for Customer Order API
user update the multilines payload with "123305","123306","1BL","1","35.04","53.09"
User execute post request for Multilines Customer Sales Order API
user should receive 201 response code
Capture the response data for multiple customer sales order
User login into SCM application
User navigate to Order Management
User navigate to "Order Management (New)" Sub section
User clicks on "Manage Orders" under Actions menu
User should see Manage Orders Page
User enters the customer sales order number for multiline order
User clicks on search
User should see the order status as "Awaiting Shipping" for all products

elements.name: Validate Customer Sales Order Status  in SaaS after Received

steps.name: User login into SCM application
User Clicks on Home Icon
User navigate to Inventory Management
Select the "Peckham - 1BL" on InventoryManagement Screen
User Select "Shipment Lines" from Quick Access
User enter the Multiline CustomerSalesOrder Number
User tabs out
User enter  CustomerMultiLineSalesOrder Number under ShipmentLines
User Should see Shipment Lines Page for products "123305" , "123306" with Line Status as Ready to release
User clicks on Pick Release from More Actions
User should see the status for CustomerSalesOrder as "Released to warehouse" for products "123305" , "123306"
User should Capture ShipmentID for CustomerSalesOrder for products "123305","123306"

elements.name: Perform Confirm Pick for the Customer Sales Order created

steps.name: User login into SCM application
User Clicks on Home Icon
User navigate to Inventory Execution
User Clicks on "Confirm Pick"
User Should see Confirm Picks page
User selects the Organization as "Peckham - 1BL"
User clicks on Continue
User Should see Confirm Picks page
User selects "Order Number" from Advanced search
User enters  CustomerSalesOrder Number for MultiLine
User tabs out
User should see the tiles contaning "123305" and "123306" and "Peckham - 1BL" information
User selects Pick All Items
User should see Confirm Pick and Next option
User enter subinventory info as "Peckham - 1BL" , "123305", "123306", picked quantity  for all products in Customer Sales Order
Click on Confirm Pick and Close

elements.name: Perform Ship Goods for the Customer Sales Order created

steps.name: User login into SCM application
User Clicks on Home Icon
User navigate to Inventory Execution
User Clicks on "Ship Goods"
User Should see Ship Goods page
User selects the Organization as "Peckham - 1BL"
User clicks on Continue
User Should see Ship Goods page
User enters Shipment Number for Customer Sales Order for MultiLine product "123305","123306"
User clicks on Continue
User should see Shipment page to ship goods for products "123305","123306"
User clicks on Shipment Number tile for products "123305","123306" and validate the shipment Quantity
Click on Confirm Shipment for Customer SO

elements.name: Validate Customer Sales Order Status  in SaaS after Shipped

steps.name: User login into SCM application
User Clicks on Home Icon
User navigate to Inventory Management
Select the "Peckham - 1BL" on InventoryManagement Screen
User Select "Shipment Lines" from Quick Access
User enter the Multiline CustomerSalesOrder Number
User tabs out
User should see the status for CustomerSalesOrder as "Interfaced" for products "123305" , "123306"
User should validate shipped quantity for Customer Sales Order for products "123305" , "123306"

name: Create Customer Sales Order Using API and Perform Full and Partial shipment
